sibility.Accessible, java.util.EventListener, java.awt.image.ImageObserver, java.awt.MenuContainer, QueryListener , java.io.Serializable public class ArgumentConfigurer extends Query implements QueryListener This class is an editor to configure the a

istener This class is an editor to configure the arguments of an object. It supports setting kind :input, output, in-output or return and a type and adding and removing arguments. Only arguments that extend the Argument class are listed, sin

that extend the Argument class are listed, since more primitive Argument cannot be configured in this way. Since: Ptolemy II 2.3 Version: $Id: ArgumentConfigurer.java,v 1.17 2004/04/13 02:57:05 cxh Exp $ Author: Steve Neuendorffer, Edward A. L
